name: uipath-workflow-migrator
description: UiPath Workflow Migrator skill for approval-gated Studio project migration with the bundled UiPath Upgrade CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze, migrate, and remediate UiPath projects
interface.longDescription: Use UiPath Workflow Migrator to analyze legacy Studio projects, generate approval-gated migration reports, run the bundled Upgrade CLI, and remediate migrated output.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this UiPath project and prepare a migration report.
Migrate this approved UiPath project with Workflow Migrator.
